paragraphs: IATF d”ô jama ro cidajin. Requests so d”ô rakt”ô summarinz”ôna kuru rowot”ôna k”ôla public request records lan suro cidaram GitHub IATf ye d”ôn, website ad”ôyen, au sandi indisoyen.

Adreswa k…ôlanzabe, lamba telefanbe, bayanwa kwasabe, au bayanna bayanbe k…ôla am faidat…ôwu nzunduwa banabe soye suron mbeji ba sai dai shi ad«Ě m«Ěrad«Ěz«Ěna kuru IATF d«Ěye kulas«Ěd«Ě k«Ělanz«Ěro s«Ědinro.

IATF ye kulashi sadin k…ôla cida d…ô'a fit, feasibility, usefulness, kuru cida d…ôye suro public repository yen kara.
Awowa laa so d«Ěga g«Ěnyi ro waljin, g«Ěrt«Ěyin, au faltin kawu sha koltin ro.
